sourceMovie.title: Eternals
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Eternals works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Avengers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Eternals clicked for you, The Avengers (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Avengers: Infinity War
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Eternals clicked for you, Avengers: Infinity War (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Eternals?
faq.answer: Try The Avengers, Avengers: Infinity War, Avengers: Age of Ultron—each shares DNA with Eternals while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Eternals?
faq.answer: Eternals (2021) is best described as Science Fiction, Action, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Eternals worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
